form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Electing Members to a certain standing committee of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That the following named Members be and are hereby elected to the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Standards of Official Conduct.—
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Zoe Lofgren of California, Chairman; Mr. Chandler, Mr. Butterfield, Ms. Castor of Florida, Mr. Welch.
